title: Contract Metadata Interface
description: Reusable metadata for standard interfaces (ERC-20, ERC-721, etc.). Provides groups, actions, events, and messages that can be included by contract metadata files via the includes field.

groups.description: Named groups for organizing actions in the UI.

actions.description: User-facing actions, keyed by free-form identifier. Each action references an ABI function via its `function` field. Multiple actions may target the same function to provide UX variants.

events.description: Per-event metadata. Keys can be a bare ABI name, a full signature for overloads, or a 32-byte topic hash for unverified contracts.

errors.description: Per-error metadata. Keys can be a bare ABI name, a full signature for overloads, or a 4-byte selector for unverified contracts.

messages.description: EIP-712 typed message metadata, keyed by primary type name.
